This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Element.scroll(auto): return type
  assert_true: expected true got false
[FAIL] Element.scroll(instant): return type
  assert_true: expected true got false
[FAIL] Element.scroll(smooth): return type
  assert_true: expected true got false

  assert_equals: Position after await expected 5000 but got 0

  assert_equals: Position after await expected 5000 but got 0
